### Performance Enhancers: Are They Just Tools?

Some say it’s to help elite athletes perform at peak levels, just like that last hill on a bike ride feels a lot harder than the first. Without them, wouldn’t it level the playing field a bit more? Think about trying to beat last year's marathon time or simply staying ahead during those tough last quarters. 

I don’t judge anyone who chooses this path; we live in a hypercompetitive world. Every edge helps. And for some, performing better without drugs seems easier said than done. So before saying no...maybe consider both sides. 

Just something to think about next time around. 🆙💪🧰 #SportsDebate 🧑‍⚕️💪
